stem: A delivery driver receives tips. On average, the tip is 12% of the customer’s bill. At this rate, which of the following is closest to the tip the driver can expect when a customer has a bill that is $86.70?
rationale:
Choice B is correct. 12% of $86.70 is 0.12 × $86.70 = $10.40, which is closest to $10.00.

Choice A is incorrect. This is too low for 12% of $86.70.

Choice C is incorrect. This is approximately 14% of $86.70, not 12%.

Choice D is incorrect. This is approximately 16% of $86.70, not 12%.
